# Automate With Marwin

> AI & Workflow Automation Specialist — Marwin G. Emia builds n8n, Make.com, Zapier, and GoHighLevel workflows with AI integrations (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok) to help agencies and growing businesses turn manual work into reliable, scalable systems.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio, services, process, case studies, and contact for AI and workflow automation work.

## Sections

- [Services](/#services): Workflow automation, app integrations, executive assistance, process optimization.
- [My Work](/#automations): n8n, Make.com, GoHighLevel, and Zapier case studies.
- [About](/#about): Background, expertise, and approach.
- [Process](/#process): Engagement workflow from discovery to delivery.
- [Certifications](/#certifications): Credentials and training.
- [Tools](/#tools): Platforms and software stack.
- [Contact](/#contact): Book a free call, email, or hire via Upwork.
